mapper.sql: id, idempotency_key, user_id, request_hash, txn_id, status, error_code, response_snapshot, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM idempotency_keys WHERE idempotency_key = #{uniqueRequestId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM idempotency_keys WHERE txn_id = #{txnId} LIMIT 1
UPDATE idempotency_keys SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE txn_id = #{txnId} RETURNING
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO idempotency_keys (id, idempotency_key, user_id, request_hash, txn_id, status, error_code, response_snapshot, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{idempotencyKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{requestHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{txnId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{responseSnapshot,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
